chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.308 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.1760/2025 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 & 12. 3. For order on CMA No.1761/2025 4. For order on CMA No.1762/2025 5. For hearing of main case 23.02.2026 Mr. Atta Muhammad Qureshi, Advocate for the applicant Under instructions, learned counsel does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
